title: pseudocyclosorus duclouxii
intro: Pseudocyclosorus duclouxii is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the Ducloux's maiden fern or Ducloux's shield fern. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pseudocyclosorus duclouxii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and soothing respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in decoctions or infusions, either on its own or in combination with other herbs, to harness its medicinal properties.
